title: Gender Reveal “Boy or Girl?” Question Mark Balloon – 100cm Large Foil Air Balloon for Baby Shower Decorations, Party Centrepiece & Photo Prop (White with Gold Text)
features: 1️⃣ Perfect for Gender Reveal Celebrations Make your big reveal unforgettable! This large 100cm “Boy or Girl?” question mark balloon is a fun and eye-catching decoration that creates excitement at any baby shower or gender reveal party.
2️⃣ Elegant & Neutral Design Beautiful white foil balloon with gold lettering and pastel blue and pink accents — perfect for any theme, whether you’re celebrating a baby boy or girl.
3️⃣ Premium Foil Material Crafted from durable, high-quality foil that holds air securely for days. Thick, leak-resistant design that’s reusable with care.
4️⃣ Easy to Inflate & Display Simply inflate with straw — no helium required! The sturdy base keeps it upright, making it perfect for tables, entryways, or photo backdrops.
5️⃣ Ideal Party Decoration & Photo Prop Add instant charm to your celebration. Great for photos, videos, and surprise moments — a must-have for parents-to-be and party planners alike.
description: Product description 🎈 Celebrate Your Baby Reveal in Style! Add excitement and a touch of elegance to your gender reveal party with this 100cm “Boy or Girl?” Question Mark Balloon . Its bold gold lettering and soft pastel design make it the perfect centerpiece for your special moment. ✨ Eye-Catching & Elegant Design Designed with white foil, gold text, and pink-and-blue baby-themed icons, this balloon blends beautifully with any gender reveal or baby shower décor. 💨 Easy to Inflate & Set Up No helium required! Inflate quickly with air and use the self-sealing valve for convenience. The weighted base keeps it stable and upright for display. 🎉 Premium Quality & Long-Lasting Made from strong, thick foil that resists leaks and can be reused if handled gently. Keeps its shape for days — perfect for early party setup. 📸 Perfect Photo Prop & Gift Whether you’re hosting a baby shower or gender reveal, this balloon creates unforgettable photo moments. A thoughtful and fun decoration for expecting parents. Warning :Not suitable for children under 3 years. For use under adult supervision Safety Warning Warning:Children can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Keep uninflated balloons away from children. Discard broken balloons at once. Warning:Not suitable for children under 3 years. For use under adult supervision
